## Checklist

- [ ] Spec / feature matrix updated (`docs/spec/feature-matrix.md`) when behaviour changes
- [ ] Env or Convex dashboard changes documented (if any)
- [ ] `bun run format:fix && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test` locally
